checks.name: RPC reachability
checks.remediation: Confirm the RPC URL, host reachability, reverse proxy, and local validator process before retrying.

checks.detected_value: port 2559 not present in listening sockets
checks.expected_value: port 2559 listening on a local interface
checks.name: Peer port 2559 listening
checks.remediation: Start or reconfigure postfiatd so the peer port is exposed locally, then verify any reverse proxy or host-networking setup.

checks.expected_value: best-effort confirmation that tcp/2559 is not blocked
checks.name: Firewall accessibility
checks.remediation: Run the firewall check on a Linux host with `ufw`, `nft`, `iptables`, or `firewall-cmd`, or review cloud firewall settings manually.

checks.name: Upload report
checks.remediation: The preflight run is still valid locally. Check the remote endpoint, auth expectations, TLS, and network egress before retrying upload.
